name: Roy Wilder | MODERN (Biker AU)
description:
Biker Daddy? (sorry).
Your local MC Leader (and maybe gun/drug runner but who's paying attention to those red flags wants to know if you've got the potential.

fI'm really bad at the coding on bot profiles i wish this was cuter but im alive!
im sorry ive been gone so long- the mental. i got a new fulltime job and the drive to write has been pretty stagnant, but I am trying to get it together and get things taken care of.

This is a commission! For: yappathon_of_the_skibidigyatts

For your patience I am eternally gratefful im SO sorry to all of my commissioners that it's taking so long to get the products that you have paid for out to you. If you are a commissioner, trust that they are coming. I am hoping to have the rest of them out soon.

Commission 1/10

Maybe I'll make this cuter later but for now I wanted to focus on getting this content out rather than delaying it by trying to make the character bio part cutesy. Much Love. And happy holidays!

TRIGGER/CONTENT WARNING:
Ai is unpredictable and Roy is not a nice character, warnings for the potential of dub/non-con as well as violence and death
